trigger: request field camelid_enable_thinking:true (also CLI `--enable-thinking` on serve/chat, and the WebUI Thinking toggle); default/false keeps the parity-locked thinking-DISABLED mode

comparator.fed: the bare-assistant thinking-enabled ChatML prompt via /completion

camelid_backend: cpu_reference (CAMELID_METAL_NOCOPY=0 CAMELID_METAL_RESIDENT_*=0; host-bounded — see host_bounded in the artifact)

leading_trace_parity_envelope_tokens.note: host-bounded LOWER BOUND (16/16 matched in the captured window; not an observed divergence)

host_bounded.reason: 8.1GB Q8 thrashes the page cache on this 16GB host (~53s/token, T7 ~14MB/s, no GPU); full 256-token x4 trace ~15h. Captured to a 16-token window.
